description: Implement Execution/WriteScope.cs (IsInScope / Overlaps / segment-matcher) fresh to the §2.1 spec - real segment-glob parsing with literal prefix/suffix, multiple-* per segment, bounded mid-**, leading **/ and *-matches-empty - so the full 27-row truth table and both fuzz properties pass (and the suite that was red against the naive matcher goes green), without editing the tests
